Sahara Desert Tour from Marrakech (3 Days)

Luxury Sahara tour starting from Marrakech with camel trekking and desert camp.

✔ Trusted local guides✔ 100+ happy travelers✔ Flexible booking

Why Choose This Tour

  • ✓ Departure from Marrakech with private transport
  • ✓ Expert local guides throughout your journey
  • ✓ Luxury desert camp with private tent
  • ✓ Camel trek at sunset and sunrise

Itinerary

  • Day 1: Marrakech → Atlas Mountains → Dades Valley
  • Day 2: Dades → Merzouga → Camel trek → Desert camp
  • Day 3: Sunrise over dunes → Return to Marrakech

What's Included

  • ✓ Private air-conditioned transport
  • ✓ Luxury desert camp accommodation
  • ✓ All meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner)
  • ✓ Professional English-speaking guide
  • ✓ Camel trekking experience

From €450 / person

Groups of 2-6 people • Private tours available

✔ Free cancellation up to 48h
